Your Application Assessment:
Score: {{ $json.output[0].content[0].text.score }}/100

{{ $json.output[0].content[0].text.strengths }}

parameters.subject: =Update on your Software Engineer application |{{ $('02 | Generate Candidate ID').item.json.candidate_id }}
parameters.message:
=

Dear {{ $('01 | Candidate Application Form').item.json.full_name }},

Thank you for taking the time to apply for the Software Engineer position and for your interest in joining our team.

After carefully reviewing your application, we have decided to move forward with other candidates whose experience more closely matches our current requirements at this time.

We genuinely appreciate the effort you put into your application, and we encourage you to apply for future opportunities with us that align with your skills and experience.

We wish you the very best in your job search and in your career.

Kind regards,
HR Team

Reference ID: {{ $('02 | Generate Candidate ID').item.json.candidate_id }}

values.content:
You are an expert technical recruiter specialising in Software Engineering roles.

Analyse the resume text and return ONLY a raw JSON object with these exact keys:

{
"score": 0,
"summary": "",
"strengths": [],
"weaknesses": [],
"recommended_stage": ""
}

Rules:

* score must be integer 0-100
* summary max 100 words
* strengths must contain 3-5 items
* weaknesses must contain 1-3 items
* recommended_stage must be one of:
  "Phone Screen",
  "Technical Interview",
  "Final Interview",
  "Offer",
  "Reject",
  "Manual Review"

Do not wrap JSON in markdown.
Do not explain anything.
Return ONLY valid JSON.

parameters.formDescription: Please answer all questions carefully. Each question carries 20 marks (Total: 100 marks). Your responses will be evaluated by our AI technical evaluator.

values.placeholder: Enter your full name exactly as submitted in application
Enter your email address (same as application)

values.fieldLabel: Q1: Explain the difference between REST and GraphQL APIs. When would you choose one over the other? (20 marks)
values.placeholder: Provide a detailed technical explanation with real-world use cases...

values.fieldLabel: Q2: Describe how you would optimize a slow database query. What tools and techniques would you use? (20 marks)
values.placeholder: Explain your approach, tools, indexing strategies, and optimization techniques...

values.fieldLabel: Q3: How would you design a scalable microservices architecture for an e-commerce platform? (20 marks)
values.placeholder: Describe services, communication patterns, data management, and scalability strategies...

values.fieldLabel: Q4: Explain your approach to debugging a production issue where users report intermittent failures. (20 marks)
values.placeholder: Detail your debugging methodology, tools, logging strategies, and resolution approach...

values.fieldLabel: Q5: What is your experience with CI/CD pipelines? Describe a pipeline you have built or worked with. (20 marks)
values.placeholder: Explain the pipeline stages, tools used, deployment strategies, and automation practices...

values.content:
=You are an expert senior technical interviewer evaluating a Software Engineer candidate.

EVALUATION CRITERIA (Each question worth 20 marks, Total: 100 marks):

Q1 (REST vs GraphQL - 20 marks):
- Understanding of both architectures (5 marks)
- Clear comparison of strengths/weaknesses (5 marks)
- Real-world use case examples (5 marks)
- Decision-making rationale (5 marks)

Q2 (Database Query Optimization - 20 marks):
- Knowledge of profiling tools (5 marks)
- Indexing strategies (5 marks)
- Query rewriting techniques (5 marks)
- Performance monitoring approach (5 marks)

Q3 (Microservices Architecture - 20 marks):
- Service decomposition strategy (5 marks)
- Inter-service communication (5 marks)
- Data management patterns (5 marks)
- Scalability and resilience design (5 marks)

Q4 (Production Debugging - 20 marks):
- Systematic debugging methodology (5 marks)
- Logging and monitoring tools (5 marks)
- Root cause analysis approach (5 marks)
- Communication and resolution strategy (5 marks)

Q5 (CI/CD Pipeline - 20 marks):
- Pipeline stages understanding (5 marks)
- Tool knowledge (5 marks)
- Automation practices (5 marks)
- Real project experience (5 marks)

SCORING GUIDELINES:
- 18-20: Exceptional answer with deep technical insight
- 15-17: Strong answer with good technical understanding
- 12-14: Adequate answer with basic knowledge
- 8-11: Weak answer with limited understanding
- 0-7: Poor answer or missing key concepts

Passing Score: 75/100 (Average 15/20 per question)

Return STRICT VALID JSON ONLY:

{
  "questionnaire_score": 0,
  "q1_score": 0,
  "q2_score": 0,
  "q3_score": 0,
  "q4_score": 0,
  "q5_score": 0,
  "phone_interview_notes": "Detailed breakdown of strengths and weaknesses per question",
  "phone_screening_result": "Pass/Fail with justification",
  "recruiter_notes": "Overall assessment and hiring recommendation",
  "recommended_stage": ""
}

recommended_stage must be one of:
- Reject
- Phone Screen
- Technical Interview
- Final Interview

Candidate Details:

Candidate ID: {{ $json.candidate_id }}
Full Name: {{ $json.full_name }}
Resume Score: {{ $json.resume_score }}/100

Candidate Answers:

{{ $json.questionnaire_responses }}

parameters.subject: Congratulations - Questionnaire Passed!
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.full_name }},

Congratulations! You have successfully passed the technical questionnaire stage.

Your Results:

  • Total Score: {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.questionnaire_score }}/100
  • Q1 (REST vs GraphQL): {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.q1_score }}/20
  • Q2 (Database Optimization): {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.q2_score }}/20
  • Q3 (Microservices Architecture): {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.q3_score }}/20
  • Q4 (Production Debugging): {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.q4_score }}/20
  • Q5 (CI/CD Pipeline): {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.q5_score }}/20

Evaluation Summary:
{{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.phone_screening_result }}

Next Steps:
{{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.recommended_stage }}

Our HR team will contact you within 2-3 business days to schedule your next interview.

Best regards,
HR Team

Reference ID: {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.candidate_id }}

parameters.subject: Update Regarding Your Application
parameters.message:
=

Hi {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.full_name }},

Thank you for completing the technical questionnaire and for your interest in joining our team.

After careful evaluation of your questionnaire responses, we have decided not to proceed further with your application at this time.

Your Score: {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.questionnaire_score }}/100

We appreciate the time and effort you invested in the process. We encourage you to continue developing your skills and apply for future opportunities that match your expertise.

We wish you the best in your job search and career growth.

Best regards,
HR Team

Reference ID: {{ $("24 | Parse Evaluation Result").item.json.candidate_id }}
